articles.title: Sign-ups for the Lima SC are open!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Lima Special Championships, one of the major VGC events in Latin America, held on 23–24 May 2026!

articles.title: Stream details and caster line-up for the Seville SC have been announced!
articles.snippet: The tournament will be streamed by TPCi on 28–29 March, with Charlie Merriman, Kosta Daidimos, Lee Provost and Markus Hamann as casters, and Victory Road behind the scenes!

articles.title: Sign-ups for the Melbourne Regional are open!
articles.snippet: All you need to know about the 2026 Melbourne Regional Championships, one of the major VGC events in Oceania, held on 23–24 May 2026!

articles.title: The requirements for a Worlds invite in South Korea have been announced!
articles.snippet: PKI has announced that the top 16 players at the PTC, to be held on 24–25 May, will receive an invite to the 2026 World Championships, with the top 4 earning Travel Awards!

articles.title: Details about the 2026 Trainers Cup (PTC) have been announced!
articles.snippet: The most important tournament this season in South Korea will be played in Pokémon Champions and will take place on 24–25 May in Seoul! 64 players will qualify through the Global Challenge, directly…

articles.title: Pokemon Presents February 2026
articles.snippet: Tune in for exciting Pokemon news and announcements.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Paldean Fates Now Available
articles.snippet: The latest Pokemon TCG expansion featuring Shiny Pokemon is now available at retailers.

articles.title: Pokemon Scarlet and Violet DLC: The Indigo Disk
articles.snippet: Explore the Terarium and encounter legendary Pokemon.

articles.title: Pokemon TCG: Prismatic Evolutions Announced
articles.snippet: A special expansion featuring Terastal Pokemon coming January 2025.

articles.title: Pokemon Legends: Z-A Coming 2026
articles.snippet: The next Pokemon RPG set in the Kalos region announced.
